title: Configuration
description: Schema for Configuration in Nuix ECC REST API

template.description: name of the Template used by the collection configuration

category.description: name of the Category (optional value attached to a collection configuration)

targets.description: array of Target IDs used in this collection configuration

computers.description: array of Computer GUIDs used in this collection configuration

hasInputs.description: true if any input paths exist within the targets or computers specified in this collection configuration

tasks.description: array of Tasks used in this collection configuration
